sentences.arabic: انْتِشَارُ الْأَخْبَارِ الزَّائِفَةِ عَبْرَ الْإِنْتِرْنِتِ يُمَثِّلُ تَهْدِيدًا لِاسْتِقْرَارِ الْمُجْتَمَعَاتِ وَنَزَاهَةِ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Širenje lažnih vijesti putem interneta predstavlja prijetnju stabilnosti društava i integritetu informacija.
sentences.translationEn: The spread of fake news over the internet represents a threat to the stability of societies and the integrity of information.

sentences.arabic: فَالشَّائِعَاتُ تَنْتَقِلُ بِسُرْعَةٍ هَائِلَةٍ، مِمَّا يَصْعُبُ مَعَهُ التَّحَقُّقُ مِنْ صِحَّةِ مَصْدَرِهَا فِي الْوَقْتِ الْمُنَاسِبِ.
sentences.translation: Glasine se šire ogromnom brzinom, što otežava pravovremenu provjeru vjerodostojnosti njihovog izvora.
sentences.translationEn: Rumors travel at tremendous speed, making it difficult to verify the authenticity of their source in a timely manner.

sentences.arabic: يَتَعَيَّنُ عَلَى الْمُسْتَخْدِمِينَ التَّأَكُّدُ مِنْ صِدْقِيَّةِ الْخَبَرِ قَبْلَ إِعَادَةِ نَشْرِهِ لِتَجَنُّبِ تَضْلِيلِ الْآخَرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Korisnici se moraju uvjeriti u istinitost vijesti prije nego što je ponovo objave kako bi izbjegli obmanjivanje drugih.
sentences.translationEn: Users must ensure the truthfulness of news before resharing it to avoid misleading others.

sentences.arabic: أَمْسَى التَّثْقِيفُ الْإِعْلَامِيُّ ضَرُورَةً مُلِحَّةً لِتَمْكِينِ النَّاسِ مِنْ كَشْفِ الِادِّعَاءَاتِ الْبَاطِلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Medijska pismenost postala je hitna potreba kako bi se ljudima omogućilo otkrivanje lažnih tvrdnji.
sentences.translationEn: Media literacy has become an urgent necessity to enable people to detect false claims.

sentences.arabic: فَالْحَقِيقَةُ هِيَ الدِّعَامَةُ الَّتِي تُبْنَى عَلَيْهَا الثِّقَةُ بَيْنَ الْأَفْرَادِ وَالْمُؤَسَّسَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Istina je oslonac na kojem se gradi povjerenje između pojedinaca i institucija.
sentences.translationEn: Truth is the pillar upon which trust between individuals and institutions is built.
